components.name: OTAServerDemo Android App
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: Nuvoton OTAServerDemo Android application and related pre-built APK/AAR artifacts under Utilities/androidApp.

properties.name: bsp:version-note
properties.value: app/debug/output.json records versionName 1.0, while app/build.gradle records versionName 2.1.2.

components.name: FatFs
components.author: ChaN
components.description: FatFs - Generic FAT file system module for embedded systems (ANSI C/C89), integrated as vendored source code.

license.name: FatFs license (BSD-like, as declared by ChaN in source header)

properties.name: bsp:component-source
properties.value: FatFs (ChaN) - Generic FAT file system module

components.name: FreeRTOS-Kernel
components.author: Amazon.com, Inc. (FreeRTOS project)
components.description: FreeRTOS Kernel vendored in ThirdParty/FreeRTOS, including kernel source, public headers, ARM_CM0 GCC/IAR portable layers, memory managers, and demo/common example files.

properties.name: bsp:cpe-evidence
properties.value: NVD CPE dictionary: cpe:2.3:o:freertos:freertos-kernel:10.4.6:*:*:*:*:*:*:* (matches CVE-2024-28115 and related FreeRTOS-Kernel advisories)

components.name: SmartcardLib
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: SmartcardLib is a first-party pre-built smartcard protocol library for supported NuMicro MCUs. The library provides ISO-7816 smartcard activation, reset, card information, and T=0/T=1 transmission APIs through the SCLIB interface.

components.name: TouchView
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: TouchView is a GUI tool for developing and tuning touch key functions on supported NuMicro MCUs. The tool is included in the corresponding BSP as a pre-built executable.

components.name: TouchView_MP
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: TouchView_MP is a GUI mass production tool for touch key functions on supported NuMicro MCUs. The tool is included in the corresponding BSP as a pre-built executable.

properties.name: bsp:usage
properties.value: host-side Windows touch panel mass production utility
